name: @radzor/two-factor-auth
description: TOTP-based two-factor authentication. Generate secrets, create QR URIs, and verify tokens (RFC 6238).

inputs.name: issuer
inputs.description: App or service name shown in authenticator apps

events.name: onVerified
events.description: Fired when a token is verified

actions.name: generateQrUri
actions.description: Generate an otpauth:// URI for QR code

actions.name: verifyToken
actions.description: Verify a TOTP token against a secret
